name: Square Head Zombies 2 - FPS Game
short_description: New zombies need to be defeated in Square Head Zombies 2. Go to new places, find and destroy them all.
detailed_description:
After killing all zombies in the first game, the zombie plague spread through the world, now you will face more enemies in Square Head Zombies 2.

You will face zombies that attack at a short distance and from long distances, some are slow, others are extremely fast.

More zombies, more challenges.

Fight with zombies in the shopping, big cities, beaches, offices, farms. There is a lot of places that you will find enemies.

Game Features:

- Different type of zombies
- Ammo is not infinite anymore like in the first game, collect ammo through the levels to be able to kill all zombies
- New levels
- New achievements
